ddls:
CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the risk assessment */,
  "non_problem_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population in the Non-Problem category */,
  "at_risk_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population in the At Risk category */,
  "problem_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population in the Problem category */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used for the risk assessment */,
  "assessment_method" TEXT /* Method used for the risk assessment (e.g., survey, interview) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the state */,
  "state_website" TEXT /* Website of the state's health department */,
  "health_department_name" TEXT /* Name of the state's health department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk category */,
  "category_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the risk category (e.g., percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk assessment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the assessment */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log was created */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., creation, update, deletion) */,
  "log_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_logs_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES risk_assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare provider, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the user's institution */,
  "department" TEXT /* Name of the user's department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the intervention is implemented */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the intervention started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the intervention ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the intervention */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., education, treatment, policy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervention_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact entry */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk assessment */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact */,
  "impact_metrics" TEXT /* Metrics used to measure the impact */,
  "impact_result" REAL /* Result of the impact (e.g., percentage change) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_impact_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_impact_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES risk_assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the historical data */,
  "non_problem_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population in the Non-Problem category */,
  "at_risk_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population in the At Risk category */,
  "problem_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population in the Problem category */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the historical data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk assessment */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "data_cleaning_notes" TEXT /* Notes on data cleaning and preprocessing */,
  "data_validation_notes" TEXT /* Notes on data validation and quality control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES risk_assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality entry */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk assessment */,
  "data_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data (e.g., percentage) */,
  "data_completeness" REAL /* Completeness of the data (e.g., percentage) */,
  "data_consistency" REAL /* Consistency of the data (e.g., percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES risk_assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., survey, administrative data) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
